programs.title: Half Man
programs.desc: 1980s. The life of bullied teenage Niall (Mitchell Robertson) turns upside down when the son of his mother's partner, the fierce and unpredictable Ruben (Stuart Campbell), comes to live with them for a while.Even though they are not related by blood, over time they both become inseparable.However, subsequent events make them move away from each other.Three decades later, Ruben (Richard Gadd) shows up uninvited at Niall's (Jamie Bell) wedding.It soon becomes clear why he reconnected with his long-lost brother.A suggestive story about the fragility of male relationships, brotherhood, betrayal, loyalty and violence.

programs.title: House of the Dragon 2
programs.desc: The second series of the production, the events of which precede the action of "Game of Thrones".After the death of Lucerys Velaryon, the son of Queen Rhaenyra Targaryen (Emma D'Arcy), which was caused by his cousin, Aemond Targaryen (Ewan Mitchell), Westeros finds itself on the brink of a bloody civil war.The Green Council supporting King Aegon (Tom Glynn-Carney) and Queen Rhaenyra's Black Council are fighting for influence.Each side claims the Iron Throne.The dynamic development of events also affects the attitude of Rhaenyra's husband, Daemon (Matt Smith), in life.A man who spends a lot of time in Harrenhal Castle, away from his wife, changes a lot.In addition, the demons of his past begin to haunt him.

actor: King Aegon II Targaryen - Tom Glynn-Carney
Lord Corlys 'The Sea Snake' Velaryon - Steve Toussaint

programs.title: Peacemaker 2
programs.desc: Two years have passed since the last events.Chris Smith (John Cena) considers himself a real hero.However, he must earn the recognition of other heroes.

programs.title: Kinds of Kindness
programs.desc: Three seemingly unrelated stories.Emma Stone, Jesse Plemons and Willem Dafoe play various roles.A corporate manager (Jesse Plemons) lives under the dictates of an eccentric boss (Willem Dafoe).She puts his well-being above her own and doesn't question any outlandish demands.Stripped of his dignity, he tries to free himself from total control.A policeman (Jesse Plemons) misses his wife (Emma Stone) - a biologist who disappeared during a research expedition.A woman who survived the disaster returns, but her marriage is put to the test.The husband becomes paranoid and is not sure if this is the same beloved he once married.The heroes of the last story are members of a sect who are looking for a person with the power to resurrect the dead.The work of Yórgos Lánthimos - the director of "Poor Things" which won four Oscars.For his performance, Jesse Plemons was awarded the Palme d'Or at Cannes.

programs.title: Heated Rivalry
programs.desc: Two ice hockey players, Shane Hollander (Hudson Williams) and Ilya Rozanov (Connor Storrie), are united not only by ambition and the need for competition, but also by a magnetic attraction that neither of them fully understands.What begins as a secret romance between two debutants turns into an extraordinary love journey.Athletes spend eight years chasing fame on the ice rink while trying to deal with their feelings off it.They must decide whether there is room for something as fragile as love in a world of brutal competition.

actor: Man in the Crease Host #2 - Shaun Starr
Man in the Crease Host #1 - Conor McKenna

programs.title: Clerks 2
programs.desc: After Randal and Dante's store catches fire, the friends must find another job.They still cannot come to terms with the loss of the premises, but they have no money to rebuild it.They get a job in a fast food restaurant.Soon, Dante decides to leave with his fiancée to another state.Things get complicated when it turns out that the manager of the place is pregnant.Meanwhile, Dante's bachelor party is approaching.Randall plans to organize a party whose main attraction will be a stripper.However, an unfortunate mistake occurs and things get out of control.Sequel to Kevin Smith's debut film.
